summary: Backend-only testing for PDF generation and email templates features. All 12 tests PASSED. PDF generation correctly starts table on page 1 (no blank space), dates are displayed in French format (DD/MM/YYYY), and email template APIs work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: PDF generation in /app/backend/routes/invoices.py correctly implements MAX_DESC_CHARS_PER_ROW=800 to ensure table starts on page 1
Dates are properly formatted to French format (DD/MM/YYYY) using datetime.strptime and strftime
Email template endpoints (/api/settings/email-templates, /api/settings/email-logo) are working correctly
Test email endpoint successfully sends emails via Brevo API
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted 1 test devis (DEV-2026-0032) during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF generation features verified: 1) Table starts on page 1 immediately after header (no blank page), 2) Dates displayed in French format (En date du: DD/MM/YYYY), 3) Short description devis fits on 1 page, 4) Long description devis (2000+ chars) spans multiple pages correctly. Email template APIs all working.

verified_features.pdf_table_starts_page_1: PASS - DEV-2026-0027 shows table on page 1 immediately after header
verified_features.pdf_dates_displayed: PASS - 'En date du: 13/01/2026' visible in PDF
verified_features.pdf_short_desc_single_page: PASS - DEV-2026-0030 fits on 1 page (18212 bytes)
